final:
// // This module decrements the 4-bit binary counter on each positive clock edge when enabled. The counter resets to zero when the reset signal is deactivated.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (en) begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module decrements the 4-bit binary counter on each positive clock edge when enabled. The counter resets to zero when the reset signal is deactivated.
